airport.name: Chongqing Jiangbei International Airport
airport.toCity: Take Metro Line 10 directly to city center, or use airport taxis and buses.

transport.metro: Metro is efficient for major sites; buy tickets with cash or via apps.
transport.taxi: Taxis are cheap; use apps like Didi to avoid language issues.
transport.didi: Didi app works like Uber; set up with international payment.
tips: Metro runs from 6 AM to 11 PM.

payment.alipay: Alipay supports foreign cards; download and register with passport.
payment.wechatPay: WeChat Pay allows international card linking for easy payments.
payment.cash: Carry small cash; some street vendors may not accept cards.
payment.foreignCard: Visa/Mastercard accepted at hotels, malls; less common elsewhere.

tips: Check for English-speaking staff at hotels.
Ask for mild spice if sensitive.
Choose busy street food stalls for freshness.

emergency.localTip: Watch out for steep slopes and dense fog, especially in winter.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (April-May) or Autumn (September-October) for comfortable weather.
